name: docker-skill
description: Generate production-ready Docker Compose files with healthchecks, restart policies, and volumes
goal: Generate production-ready Docker Compose files with healthchecks, restart policies, and volumes
rules: always include volume mounts for persistent data

name: debug-skill
description: Diagnose and fix errors by analyzing stack traces, logs, and runtime behavior
goal: Diagnose and fix errors by analyzing stack traces, logs, and runtime behavior
rules: verify fix doesn't break other tests
antiPatterns: fixing symptoms without understanding root cause

name: refactor-skill
description: Improve code structure without changing behavior, following best practices
goal: Improve code structure without changing behavior, following best practices
workflow: write tests to lock current behavior
rules: lock behavior with tests before refactoring
run existing tests after each change
